transcript: Speaker A: I had multiple choices for English tests. Speaker B: I had a deadline approaching. Speaker C: It was very affordable for me. Speaker B: I gave the DET twice, but still managed to get my scores before my deadline. Speaker A: I came to know where I lack and what areas I need to work on. Speaker C: DET gave me the convenience of taking it from wherever I wanted in the world. Like, I took it from right here. Speaker B: I got my scores within 12 hours just by paying a little extra. Speaker C: It also takes just 60 minutes. Speaker A: DET seemed like the perfect choice.
on_screen_text:
Why I took the duolingo english test
Results in 2 days
Take free practice test
Take the DET anytime anywhere
Faster results in 24 hours
1 hour test
duolingo english test
summary: Three students share their positive experiences taking the Duolingo English Test (DET). They highlight key benefits such as affordability, fast results, convenience of taking it from home, and a short 1-hour duration. The ad positions DET as the perfect choice for students facing tight deadlines.
